_publications._publicationTitle: An integrative analysis of meningioma tumors reveals the determinant genes and pathways of malignant transformation.

_contextSnippet: we could identify SPRY2 as a gene with SNPs in strong linkage disequilibrium between the mQTL list and the first genotypic cohort
details: Successfully identified SNPs in strong linkage disequilibrium for SPRY2 gene between mQTL list and genotypic cohorts
